_comment: S3 bucket policy granting CloudFront OAC read access to the Angular SPA bucket.
_instructions: 1. Create your CloudFront distribution first (needs OAC ARN).
2. Replace BUCKET_NAME with your actual S3 bucket name.
3. Replace CLOUDFRONT_OAC_ARN with the OAC ARN from your CloudFront distribution.
4. Apply via CLI: aws s3api put-bucket-policy --bucket BUCKET_NAME --policy file://infra/s3-bucket-policy.json
